title: Glass Grey Elephant Collectible Ornaments for Home - Crystal Elephant Animal Paperweight
features: Crystal Elephant Statue: Elephants symbolize strength, wisdom and good luck, the cute and elegant design is loved by women and elephant lovers. Because they are handmade, each elephant will be slightly different in color and size

Nice Gift Idea: Sparkling elephant statue is suitable for gifts to mother, daughter, wife, best friend and sister on birthday, Christmas, anniversary, wedding, mother's day, Valentine's day and other festivals to bring them good luck
Handmade Craft: Our cute elephant was made by K9 crystal, polished smooth and lifelike. Size: 11.8*13*3.6 cm/ 4.65*5.12*1.41 in.

Exquisite Home Decoration: The Crystal Elephant can be placed in the living room, bedroom and office for more fun and energy. Stunning when the sun hits the crystal elephant, the elephant sparkles. The elephant's long trunk can serve as a temporary storage rack for small items such as rings

Ready to Be Gifts: Our crystal elephant was packaged into an elegant gift box, there are a wish card (blank wish card can write wish in you want) and a wipping cloth. You can give it as a gift to your loved ones at any time
description: Our elephant figurine is made of K9 crystal, not plastic, not acrylic. Because they are handmade, each elephant will be slightly different in color and size The crystal elephant figurine is perfect for indoor decoration, put it in your home, kids' room, office, or table to bring you peace and wealth, it can also be a special gift for elephant lovers Product Specifications: Material: k9 crystals Color: Champagne Size: 11.8*13*3.6 cm Weight: About 0.7 lb./0.32 kg Package Include: 1 × crystal elephant figurine 1 × Gift box 1 × Gift card 1 × Wiping cloth
